content: Self-Refine's iterative no-supervision refinement framework can be anchored to multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a multi-perspective self-refinement loop, where each iteration leverages divergent solving perspectives to generate self-feedback rather than just correcting a single initial output. This hybrid approach resolves the limitation of single-perspective blind spots that plague vanilla Self-Refine while retaining its core advantage of no extra training or labeled data.
